chosen_action.title: Make the execution board explicit-empty marker authoritative unless a real waiting asset still exists

why_this_action.summary: The execution board explicitly reported that no truthful do-now packet remained, but selector truth detection could still be diluted by informational review-window bullets. Fixing that truth gate was the highest-leverage same-run repair.
shared_findings_used: marketing_execution_board_latest.md: explicit empty-board marker was present alongside informational review-window bullets
marketing_workflow_audit_latest.json: avoid prepared-only packet churn and fake progress
adoption_metrics_latest.json: Codeberg remains flat, so truthfulness matters more than another superficial packet refresh

result.summary: Patched execution-board truth detection so an explicit no-do-now marker is not masked by informational review-window bullets, while keeping real waiting-asset and confirmation blockers fail-closed. Added regression tests and verified the current board now evaluates as empty.
